race.comment: MYSTIC WONDER (2) has been rock-solid for the Richards & Moyle camp this campaign as she continues to put her best foot forward. Loves this track and trip and keeps Holder in the saddle. Sure to be very competitive again. MISO (4) has built nicely into this campaign with eye-catching finishes in his last three. At his top now and if Grace can have him a pair or two closer when turning for home he will prove tough to hold out. NICAJON (7) has relished the wet decks and should find another one on Saturday. Will take a sit off the speed and look to burst through late. WILLYBEAFACTOR (5) rarely attracts market support but shoulders peaks that measure up. Is always worth including in wider exotics.
